calendar.matters:
Petition For An Order To Confirm Validity Of Trust; Confirm Trustee; And Confirm Assets To Revocable Trust
Off Calendar Jul-06-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Clavel, via Zoom, for Severino Camaclang, Petitioner.

Counsel advises that his client and he have discussed the status of this matter and that he is appearing today to request to withdraw the petition.

The Petition for an Order to Confirm Validity of Trust, etc., is confirmed as withdrawn in open court.

Judge: Hon. Lydia Villarreal. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

Petition For An Order To Confirm Validity Of Trust; Confirm Trustee; And Confirm Assets To Revocable Trust
Off Calendar Jun-06-2022 Continued To Jul-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Clavel, via Zoom, for Severino Camaclang Jr., Petitioner.

The court points to the discrepancy regarding the real property listed on schedule A. Counsel reports that he discussed this issue with his client and advises of instructions listed in the pour-over will. The court points to the several discrepancies in the petition and that it is inclined to deny the petition unless counsel offers to submit additional information to the court. Counsel advises that there was a miscommunication regarding schedule A and requests a continuance to file supplements.

The matter is continued to Jul-06-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

Petition For An Order To Confirm Validity Of Trust; Confirm Trustee; And Confirm Assets To Revocable Trust
Off Calendar May-09-2022 Continued To Jun-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For An Order To Confirm Validity Of Trust; Confirm Trustee; And Confirm Assets To Revocable Trust
Off Calendar Apr-11-2022 Continued To May-09-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For An Order To Confirm Validity Of Trust; Confirm Trustee; And Confirm Assets To Revocable Trust
Off Calendar Feb-28-2022 Continued To Apr-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For An Order To Confirm Validity Of Trust; Confirm Trustee; And Confirm Assets To Revocable Trust
Off Calendar Jan-10-2022 Continued To Feb-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Clavel, via ZOOM, for Severino Camaclang, Jr., Petitioner.

The court questions whether venue is proper as there are conflicts as to where the principal place of administration is. Counsel reports that he had previously corresponded with his client in Solano county but that his principal place of residence and location of administration is at the real property located in San Francisco. Counsel confirms that his client and his client's brother live at the property. The court queries if counsel can provide proof of the preceding. Counsel confirms that he can provided the court with tax returns and utility statements if needed. The court advises that it deems venue proper for now but that this matter is being continued for counsel to address the issues with the petition and that Examiner's notes will follow.

The Petition for an Order to Confirm Validity of Trust, etc., is continued to Feb-28-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody (via ZOOM). Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.
